title: lastrea ferruginea
intro: Lastrea ferruginea, also known as the rusty maidenhair fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant properties. The health benefits of Lastrea ferruginea include its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to soothe and calm the body. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
